name: sara-self-bot
description: 🤖 سارا سلف - ربات هوشمند تلگرام با شخصیت سارا

scripts.db:reset: wrangler d1 execute sara-db --command='DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS transactions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ai_history; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS memory; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ip_hashes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS group_settings; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS group_keywords; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS group_blacklist; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS logs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS bot_settings; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS backups;' && wrangler d1 execute sara-db --file=schema.sql

author: Sara Self Team
